title: Create: Enchantment Industry
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Vk2moM7A2jk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Welcome to Create: Enchantment Industry, a mod offering more tools and methods to handle experience & enchantment in Create.
### We currently offer:
* **Liquid Experience**: High-density experience that is easy to store and transport.
* **Experience Hatch**: Interact with fluid tank directly, with your own experience.
* **Mechanical Grindstone**: Fully automated Grindstone, with extra sanding function.
* **Blaze Enchanter**: Blaze as an smart enchanting table.
* **Blaze Forger**: Blaze as an smart anvil.
* **Printer**: Copy your written book, enchanted book, name tag, train schedule and more.
* **Experience Lantern**: Absorb experience, and also work on contraption.
* **Deployer & Crushing Wheel Tweak**: Kills of Deployer & Crushing Wheel drop experience nugget.  
* **Hyper-enchantmechanism** allows you to break the limits of enchantments. 
* **Mending on belt**: Items enchanted with Mending can be repaired using Spout and Liquid Experience.
* **Deployer with Sweeping Edge**: Deployer now benefits from sword with Sweeping Edge Enchantment.
* Old Blaze Enchanter of v1.0 has returned as an optional feature **Classic Blaze Enchanter**.

#### Apotheosis series integration
* **Bulk Salvaging**.
* **Brass Bookshelf**: A bookshelf with freely configurable stats.
* **Crafting Bookshelf**: Create-ish Creative bookshelf.
* **Infuser**: Automated infusion solution with more flexible requirements.
* **Gem Cutter**: Processes gems to their highest quality.
* **Affix Augmentor**: Automated affix enhancement.

### Installation Requirements
**Create** & [**Create: Dragons Plus**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dragons-plus)

If you are a modpack author and need more customization information, please [**check this**](https://github.com/DragonsPlusMinecraft/CreateEnchantmentIndustry/blob/1.21.1/6.0.0-dev/MODPACK-README.md).

<details>
<summary>Legacy 1.+ Feature</summary>
  
### We currently offer:
* **Liquid Experiecne**: High-density experience that is easy to store and transport.
* **Disenchanter**: disenchant item and collect experience as liquid.  
* **Blaze Enchanter**: automated enchanting.
* **Printer**: Copy your written book, enchanted book, name tag and train schedule.  
* **Deployer & Crushing Wheel Tweak**: Kills of Deployer & Crushing Wheel drop experience nugget.  
* **Hyper-enchant mechanism** allows you to get enchantment whose level is higher than level cap.  
* **Mending on belt**: Items enchanted with Mending can be repaired using Spout and Liquid Experience.
* **Deployer with Sweeping Edge**: Deployer now benefits from sword with Sweeping Edge Enchantment.

### Compat with other mods
* **Experience Rotor**: Convert liquid experiece of other mods to Liquid Experiece of this mod.
* **Compat with Apotheosis**: Automatic adaptation to Apotheosis & Brewable Ancient Knowledge potion.
* **Compat with Quark**: Ancient Tome can be copied by Printer (Use any enchanted book as material).

### Installation Requirements: **Forge & Create**
</details>
